content.text: How can I dynamically configure UI variables in my Django view to support Right-to-Left (RTL) and Left-to-Right (LTR) languages?
What happens if the translation utility cannot determine the language direction?
If `translation.get_language_bidi()` fails, it typically defaults to a non-BiDi state, leading to the LTR context being returned as shown in the `else` block.
Thanks for clarifying how this function handles default cases!
